base_annual_fee.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee shall be INR 14,40,00,000 (Rupees Fourteen Crore Forty Lakhs only) per annum, payable monthly at INR 1,20,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Twenty Lakhs only) per month, on or before the 5th working day of each calendar month.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee shall be INR 14,40,00,000 (Rupees Fourteen Crore Forty Lakhs only) per annum, payable monthly at INR 1,20,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Twenty Lakhs only) per month, on or before the 5th working day of each calendar month.

escalation.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee shall be escalated on April 1 of each Contract Year by the change in the Wholesale Price Index (WPI — All Commodities) for the month of January, as published by the Office of the Economic Adviser, Ministry of Commerce & Industry, Government of India. The escalation shall be subject to a maximum cap of 8% per annum and a floor of 0% per annum.

variable_component.source_clause: In addition to the Base Monthly Fee, the Service Provider shall invoice a Variable O&M Component at the rate of INR 0.04 (Four Paise) per kWh of net energy generated by the Wind Farm, billed quarterly within 30 days of quarter end.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: The Service Provider guarantees an annual Wind Turbine Availability (WTA) of not less than 96.0% (Ninety Six percent). WTA shall be calculated as: (Total Available Hours − Grid Unavailability Hours − Force Majeure Hours) / (Total Hours in the Period) × 100.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: For each full or partial percentage point shortfall below the Guaranteed WTA of 96.0%, the Service Provider shall pay Liquidated Damages at the rate of 0.5% of the Base Annual Fee per percentage point of shortfall. Maximum LD liability shall be capped at 15% of the Base Annual Fee per annum.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: For each full or partial percentage point shortfall below the Guaranteed WTA of 96.0%, the Service Provider shall pay Liquidated Damages at the rate of 0.5% of the Base Annual Fee per percentage point of shortfall. Maximum LD liability shall be capped at 15% of the Base Annual Fee per annum.

bonus_threshold_pct.source_clause: In the event that the annual Wind Turbine Availability exceeds 98.0%, the Service Provider shall be entitled to a Performance Bonus at the rate of 1% of the Base Annual Fee for each full percentage point above the 98.0% threshold. The maximum Performance Bonus shall not exceed 5% of the Base Annual Fee in any Contract Year.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: In the event that the annual Wind Turbine Availability exceeds 98.0%, the Service Provider shall be entitled to a Performance Bonus at the rate of 1% of the Base Annual Fee for each full percentage point above the 98.0% threshold. The maximum Performance Bonus shall not exceed 5% of the Base Annual Fee in any Contract Year.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: All invoices submitted by the Service Provider shall be paid within 45 (Forty Five) days from the date of receipt of a valid tax invoice along with requisite supporting documents.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Any amounts not paid within the stipulated 45-day period shall attract simple interest at the rate of SBI Base Rate plus 2% per annum on a daily basis from the due date until the date of actual payment.

renewal_notice_months.source_clause: Either Party wishing to terminate or renegotiate this Agreement at the end of the initial Term shall provide written notice of no less than 12 (Twelve) calendar months prior to the expiry date.

validation_warnings: AMBIGUITY: Clause 4.1 states payment is due on the '5th working day' while Schedule 2 states 'within 5 calendar days'. Recommend clarification from client.
NOTE: Escalation effective date is April 1 — invoices from January to March must use the prior-year WPI rate.

C002.display_name: ReNew Power Mega-LTSA — 300 MW Wind Portfolio

base_annual_fee.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee payable by the Customer to the Service Provider shall be INR 48,00,00,000 (Rupees Forty Eight Crores only) for the first Contract Year, subject to annual WPI escalation as specified in Annexure 4.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly O&M Service Fee equivalent to 1/12th of the Base Annual Fee, i.e., INR 4,00,00,000 (Rupees Four Crores only) per month, payable on or before the 7th day of each month.

escalation.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee shall be escalated on the 1st day of April each year based on the change in the All India Wholesale Price Index (WPI — All Commodities), capped at a maximum of 10% per annum.

variable_component.source_clause: In addition to the fixed monthly O&M fee, the Service Provider shall charge a variable component of INR 0.035 per net kWh of energy generated, billed monthly along with the Base Monthly Fee.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: The Service Provider guarantees a minimum annual Machine Availability (MA) of 97.5% for the entire Wind Turbine fleet covered under this Agreement, computed using IEC 61400-26 standard methodology.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: For each percentage point of shortfall in Machine Availability below the Guaranteed Level of 97.5%, the Service Provider shall be liable to pay Liquidated Damages at the rate of 2.5% of the Base Annual Fee. Total LD liability is capped at 20% of the Base Annual Fee in any Contract Year.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Total LD liability under this Agreement shall not exceed 20% of the Base Annual Fee in any single Contract Year (i.e., a maximum of INR 9,60,00,000 per annum based on Year 1 fees).

bonus_threshold_pct.source_clause: If the annual Machine Availability exceeds 99.0%, the Service Provider shall be entitled to a Performance Incentive Bonus of 1.5% of the Base Annual Fee per percentage point of outperformance above 99.0%. Maximum bonus shall not exceed 6% of the Base Annual Fee per Contract Year.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: If the annual Machine Availability exceeds 99.0%, the Service Provider shall be entitled to a Performance Incentive Bonus of 1.5% of the Base Annual Fee per percentage point of outperformance above 99.0%.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: Payment of all undisputed invoices shall be made within 30 days from the date of receipt. The Customer shall notify the Service Provider of any invoice disputes within 7 working days of receipt.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Overdue payments shall attract interest at the rate of the RBI MCLR (1 year tenor) plus 3% per annum, calculated on a daily compounding basis from the due date.

renewal_notice_months.source_clause: Either Party intending not to renew this Agreement upon expiry of the initial 10-year Term shall provide written notice no less than 18 calendar months before the expiry date.

validation_warnings: HIGH RISK: LD rate of 2.5% per PP and cap of 20% represent significantly higher exposure than standard market LTSA terms.
NOTE: Variable component billing frequency is Monthly (not Quarterly as in C001).

C100.display_name: Adani Green — Mega Wind Portfolio (50 Page Test)

base_annual_fee.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee shall be INR 8,50,00,000 (Rupees Eight Crore Fifty Lakhs only) per annum, payable in equal monthly installments.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly payment shall be 1/12th of the Base Annual Fee.

escalation.source_clause: The fee shall escalate annually on April 1st based on the WPI (All Commodities) movement from the previous January. Escalation is capped at 7% and has a floor of 1%.

variable_component.source_clause: A variable rate of INR 0.05 per kWh generated shall apply.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Penalty of 1.5% of Annual Fee applies for every 1% availability shortfall.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Maximum Liquidated Damages capped at 15% of Base Annual Fee.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Bonus of 0.75% of Annual Fee per 1% outperformance.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: Invoices shall be paid within 60 days of submission.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Late payments attract interest at 15% per annum.
